listeners.// address: Bind address: 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces, 127.0.0.1 for localhost only

app.// document_root: Path to frontend static files (relative to working directory)
app.// file_types: Static file types that Drogon will serve directly

log.// log_path: Directory for log files (relative to working directory)
log.// log_level: Logging level: TRACE, DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR, FATAL

db_clients.// name: Database client name (used internally by Drogon)
db_clients.name: sqlite3
db_clients.// filename: SQLite database file path (relative to working directory)

app.// threads_num: Number of worker threads (0 = auto-detect based on CPU cores)
app.// run_as_daemon: Run as background daemon (use systemd instead in production)

ssl.// cert: Path to SSL certificate file (PEM format). Leave empty to disable HTTPS.
ssl.// key: Path to SSL private key file (PEM format). Leave empty to disable HTTPS.

jwt.// secret: JWT signing secret. MUST be changed in production! Use a strong random string.

cors.// allowed_origins: Allowed origins for CORS. Use ["*"] for development, restrict in production.
cors.// max_age: CORS preflight cache duration in seconds

sophon_stream.// sdk_lib_path: Path to sophon-stream SDK library directory
sophon_stream.// sdk_config_path: Path to sophon-stream SDK configuration directory
